name: Onus
escalation_vectors: AmazonS3FullAccess creds (and DB creds) in Cyclos config
impact: 2 million ONUS users’ information including EKYC data, personal information, and password hash was leaked.

links.text: The attack on ONUS – A real-life case of the Log4Shell vulnerability
